macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Breaks $78,600 Resistance in Key Channel Breakout
items.summary: Bitcoin surged above $78,600, escaping a descending channel from September 2025, signaling the end of correction with April ETF inflows of $2.44 billion; it now trades around $78,800, up 0.86% in 24 hours.[5][2]

items.title: Ethereum Whales Accumulate $322M ETH Near $2,300 Support
items.summary: Ethereum whales bought over 140,000 ETH worth $322 million in 96 hours as price holds around $2,305, up 0.1% in 24 hours; key support at $2,200 with potential upside to $2,800 if it breaks $2,400.[1]

items.title: Dormant Ethereum Wallets Drained in Potential Old Exploit
items.summary: Hundreds of long-forgotten dormant Ethereum wallets were swept into a single address, with debates on causes like old keys or weak tooling tracing back years.[8]

items.title: Hyperliquid and Base See Strong Net Fund Inflows Amid Altcoin Shifts
items.summary: Hyperliquid recorded the highest net positive fund inflows last week, followed by limited gains in Base and Ethereum ecosystems, while others saw outflows; investor focus on specific blockchains intensifies.[4]

items.title: Solana Resurges with Firedancer Upgrade on Horizon
items.summary: Solana trades near $84 amid renewed activity in DeFi and memes, with the 2026 Firedancer upgrade poised to enable over 1M TPS, projecting prices to $200-$500 by year-end.[5]

items.title: GraniteShares to Launch 3x Leveraged XRP ETFs on Nasdaq May 7
items.summary: GraniteShares plans leveraged XRP ETFs amid XRP's stable trading range hinting at breakout, though it lost trading volume throne in South Korea to other altcoins.[4]

items.title: Bitcoin Bulls Show Exhaustion Signs with Binance Stablecoin Outflows
items.summary: Bitcoin trades near $78,400 after modest May gains, but recent $1.54B-$1.78B daily stablecoin outflows from Binance signal potential weakness similar to past 15% drops.[6]

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google Quietly Updates Gemini 3.5 Flash Model in LM Arena
items.summary: Google has released an upgraded Gemini 3.5 Flash model appearing in LM Arena, described as dramatically more powerful while maintaining speed and efficiency, potentially in preparation for Google I/O.

items.title: Open Design: Open-Source Alternative to Claude Design Launched
items.summary: Open Design, a new open-source tool, enables AI agents to generate complete UI designs from prompts, supporting multiple AI tools and built-in design systems, gaining attention on GitHub.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Halo 2 and Halo 3 Remakes in Active Development
items.summary: Reports indicate Halo 2 and Halo 3 Campaign Evolved remakes are actively in development, alongside updates on Halo Studios' staffing issues and Infinite's lost potential. This marks significant news for Halo fans this week.

items.title: Xbox Ditches 'Microsoft Gaming' Brand and Reconsiders Exclusivity
items.summary: New Xbox leadership under Asha Sharma retires the 'Microsoft Gaming' label, focuses on console hardware, and signals a potential return to exclusivity strategies after years of multi-platform releases. Updates also cover Project Helix and future brand direction.

items.title: Multiple New MMORPG Announcements Including TERA 2 and Aion 2
items.summary: New MMOs like TERA 2, Aion 2, Embers of the Uncrowned, Chaos W, and Dragon Sword are highlighted, amid industry drama such as Web Zen's injunction against Hound 13 over Dragon Sword self-publishing.

items.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Officially Revealed
items.summary: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced has been officially announced, alongside news of Assassin's Creed Hexe losing key staff and other Ubisoft developments.

items.title: RPG Developer Spiders Shutting Down
items.summary: French RPG studio Spiders, known for titles like GreedFall, is shutting down, marking a notable industry development.

items.title: Alien Isolation 2 Teaser Released
items.summary: A teaser for Alien Isolation 2 has surfaced, generating buzz for the survival horror sequel.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen plans unsolicited $56B offer to acquire eBay
items.summary: GameStop's CEO aims to make eBay a stronger competitor to Amazon and will take the offer directly to shareholders if rejected. The Wall Street Journal reports the bid could come as soon as this month.

items.title: Amadeus IT Group to acquire biometrics firm Idemia Public Security for €1.2B
items.summary: The Spanish travel tech company, operator of the world's largest travel booking system, announced plans to buy the French biometrics firm in an all-cash deal. This strengthens capabilities in secure travel tech.

items.title: Sony to settle PlayStation Store class action lawsuit for $7.8M
items.summary: Affected PlayStation Network users will receive automatic credits. The settlement addresses issues with the digital storefront.

items.title: Ask.com shuts down permanently
items.summary: The early search engine, known as the original AI search bot, has officially closed, marking the end of an internet era.

items.title: Microsoft releases Windows 11 KB5083631 update with 34 changes
items.summary: The optional cumulative update includes a new Xbox mode for PCs, enhanced security for batch files, faster startup apps, and other performance improvements.

items.title: Instructure confirms data breach claimed by ShinyHunters
items.summary: The educational tech firm behind Canvas disclosed a cyberattack where data was stolen; investigation into impact ongoing.
